demoExplainer: A persistent sandbox you can freely add to, edit, and delete from. You can also export your modified demo — the download becomes a regular portfolio on re-import, leaving the built-in demo fixture untouched. The demo itself can't be renamed or deleted — it's a built-in fixture, not a user artifact.

delete.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete.body: This will permanently remove all accounts, transactions, and data for this portfolio. This cannot be undone.

fields.costMethodDescription: Cómo se calcula el coste base de los valores.
fields.currencyDescription: Todos los valores se convierten a esta moneda para los totales de la cartera.
fields.calendarDescription: Identificador del calendario bursátil (p. ej. NYSE, XETR). Déjalo vacío para el valor por defecto.
fields.alphaVantageApiKeyDescription: Necesaria para obtener cotizaciones desde Alpha Vantage.
fields.alphaVantageApiKeyConfigured: Hay una clave configurada. Introduce un nuevo valor para sustituirla.
fields.alphaVantageRateLimit: Límite de tasa de Alpha Vantage
fields.alphaVantageRateLimitDescription: Llamadas por minuto permitidas por tu plan de Alpha Vantage.
